hero.title: Your plant, perfectly cared for, without complications
hero.subtitle: Monitor health, receive notifications, and access personalized guides without being an expert. PlantSync combines IoT and artificial intelligence to create your digital greenhouse.

benefits.title: More than caring for plants, caring for you
benefits.subtitle: Connect with nature from home and build routines that transform your daily wellness.

card1.title: Reduce stress
card1.desc: Plants improve your mood. We help you care for them without worries.

card2.title: Build healthy routines

how.title: Three steps to your smart garden

step1.title: 01. Register your plant
step1.desc: Take a photo or enter data manually. We identify the species and create a profile.

step2.title: 02. Connect and automate
step2.desc: Link IoT sensors to monitor humidity and light in real time.

step3.title: 03. Receive smart guidance
step3.desc: Our AI assistant analyzes data to give you personalized recommendations.

s1.title: Soil Moisture
s1.desc: Capacitive sensors that accurately measure the water level available to the roots.

s2.title: Temperature
s2.desc: Constant monitoring to detect sudden changes that may affect your plants.

s3.title: Light (Lux)
s3.desc: Measures light intensity and alerts you if they need more sun exposure.

s4.title: Actuators
s4.desc: Control water pumps and artificial lamps completely remotely.

ai.title: A 24/7 expert for your plants
ai.subtitle: Our AI analyzes sensor data and the environment to offer accurate diagnoses and proactive advice before your plant needs it.

feature1.title: Early Diagnosis
feature1.desc: Instantly detects anomalies in humidity or temperature, preventing common diseases.

feature2.title: Personalized Guidance
feature2.desc: Receive care instructions specifically tailored to your plant species and its growth stage.

feature3.title: Continuous Learning
feature3.desc: The system evolves and becomes smarter using the historical data from your own greenhouse.

pricing.title: Plans for every gardener
pricing.subtitle: From beginners to experts, we have the perfect plan for you.

q1.question: Do I need IoT sensors to use PlantSync?
q1.answer: It is not strictly necessary. You can use the app manually to keep a visual record and receive guides, although sensors automate and improve care accuracy.

q2.question: What types of plants can I register?
q2.answer: Our database includes thousands of species, from common indoor plants like Monstera or Pothos, to urban gardens and exotic succulents.

q3.question: How does Botanical AI work?
q3.answer: The AI analyzes input data (humidity, temperature, species) and cross-references it with botanical information to generate early alerts and personalized recommendations.

q4.question: Is it compatible with any mobile device?
q4.answer: Yes, PlantSync works seamlessly on iOS, Android browsers, tablets, and desktop computers, adapting to your screen.
